wordplay_note: The worthless one — lord of the world in gnostic mythology
card_description: Belial (meaning "Hebrew: worthless/without worth") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Divine Invasion*. Demonic entity who rules Earth and tries to prevent God's return. Name note: The worthless one — lord of the world in gnostic mythology. The gnostic demiurge who controls consensus reality through the Christian-Islamic church. First appears in *The Divine Invasion*.

reference.brief: Demonic entity who rules Earth and tries to prevent God's return
reference.significance: The gnostic demiurge who controls consensus reality through the Christian-Islamic church
